attributes.title: PowerShell / LOLBins — Investigate
attributes.visState:
{"title": "PowerShell / LOLBins — Investigate", "type": "markdown", "aggs": [], "params": {"fontSize": 12, "openLinksInNewTab": true, "markdown": "### ⚡ Suspicious PowerShell / LOLBins — investigate
**Open:** [Discover (raw alerts)](/app/discover) · [Wazuh app](/app/wazuh) · [MITRE T1059.001](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1059/001/) · [T1218](https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1218/)

🔧 **Tuning:** some rules are noisy in admin-heavy environments (`91809` Base64-decode, `91822` Invoke-command, `92206` PrintNightmare); `92910`/`92920` (PowerShell → Explorer/RDP) and `92212` are rare & high-signal. Use the **severity** and **detection** panels to focus on what matters.

💡 Make hosts clickable: add a URL field-formatter to `agent.id` (see the recipe README)."}}
